remarks: Lease out or Retrofit your own Business or Warehouse Storage. Unique Architectural Barn featuring large open area of Lower Level of Commercial Building Zoned for Upholstery Shop, Contractor Shop, Wood Shop, Party Rental Equipment, Catering, Art Studio and many more Multiple usages of Building. Rural Private Setting, Overhead Door for Loading Material, Ample off street Parking Available, Additional Storage Available. Current Use Custom Wood Mill Shop for over 15 Years with small office. Owner will fit to your needs. Price pending duration and type of business.
